div.class: flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] px-8 py-16 text-center
text-[8rem] font-extrabold mb-4 leading-none tracking-tighter text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 opacity-20 dark:opacity-10 select-none

h1.class: text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100 mt-2 mb-3

div.p: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

a.class: inline-block px-5 py-2.5 bg-blue-500 hover:bg-blue-600 text-white font-medium rounded-lg no-underline transition-colors
inline-block px-5 py-2.5 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-gray-600 text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 font-medium rounded-lg no-underline transition-colors
